response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong technical leadership with a proven track record in software development, architecture, and team mentorship across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, and enterprise systems). His experience with open-source projects, large-scale systems (e.g., micro-services handling millions of requests), and leadership roles (Staff Software Engineer at re:cinq, Senior roles at Optilyz) aligns well with the Head of Development role. While German proficiency is only at a basic level, his fluent English and extensive international experience mitigate this concern. His entrepreneurial background (GISCollective) and technical versatility further strengthen his candidacy.
strengths: Extensive leadership experience in senior roles, including Staff Software Engineer and founder of an open-source platform (GISCollective)
Strong technical background in modern software development, architecture, and DevOps, with expertise in Linux, Docker, and multiple languages (TypeScript, D, Java, etc.)
Proven ability to mentor teams, organize workshops, and contribute to open-source projects, demonstrating both technical and soft skills
concerns: German language proficiency is only at a 'Basic' level, which may impact client-facing communication in a German-speaking environment
Limited direct experience in IT security, risk management, or compliance, though general security awareness is implied through his work
No explicit mention of UML expertise or formal requirements management experience, though his architectural design skills are evident
